title: The Wonderful Thing
writer: Clara Beranger, Lillian Trimble Bradley, Herbert Brenon
actors: Norma Talmadge, Harrison Ford, Julia Hoyt
plot: Jacqueline Laurentine Boggs, the daughter of an American hog farmer, is schooled in France and comes to stay with an English family. There she brings a dose of reality to her snobby hosts.
